/usr/bin/ar qc TubeDistortion_artefacts/libTubeDistortion_SharedCode.a CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/PluginProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/PluginEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/StyleSheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/PluginGlobals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/UITools/AudioOscilloscope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/UITools/DecibelLitBorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/UITools/PresetBrowser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/Source/UITools/PresetManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_extra/juce_gui_extra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_ara.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_lv2_libs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TubeDistortion.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib TubeDistortion_artefacts/libTubeDistortion_SharedCode.a
